programme.desc:
With that much onshore wind and a 2.1m swell, Lagide will be a washing machine today, perfect for body whomping lessons.
🌊 Swell: 2.1m @ 16s 💨 Wind: 31.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 50.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 1.8m
📋 Onshore wind making it messy • Long period - powerful waves • Significant wind chop

programme.title: 🌊 2.9m @ 15s CROSS
programme.desc:
